common.remarks_smart_switch:
This profile only provides standby power values. 
 When you have an appliance which consumes a fixed amount of power when turned on, you can provide that value in next step of the config flow
common.remarks_smart_dimmer:
This profile only provides standby power values. 
 In the next step you can optionally provide the values of the connected light

abort.already_configured: Sensor is already configured, specify a unique_id

error.unknown: Unknown error occured, please see the logs for additional information
Unknown error occured, please see the logs for additional information
error.location_is_freezer: The selected location is a freezer

main_menu.title: Choose titl
main_menu.description: Select the type of group sensor you want to create. Choose domain based group if you want to group all entities of a specific domain, or create a sensor summing all your energy sensor. Choose standard group otherwise

data_description.area: Adds all power sensors from the specified area
data_description.create_energy_sensor: Whether powercalc needs to create a kWh sensor
data_description.device: Add the group entities powercalc creates to an existing device
data_description.force_calculate_group_energy: By default powercalc sums the energy sensors from the member sensors. Toggle this option to force creating a Riemann Sum sensor
data_description.group_energy_entities: Additional energy sensors (kWh) from your HA installation to include
data_description.group_energy_start_at_zero: When enabled, the energy sensor will start at zero when the sensor is created. Otherwise it will sum all the current member energy sensor states
data_description.group_member_devices: Add power and energy entities from the selected devices to the group
data_description.group_member_sensors: Powercalc sensors to include in the group
data_description.group_power_entities: Additional power sensors (W) from your HA installation to include
data_description.include_non_powercalc_sensors: Control whether to include non powercalc sensors when using the area option
data_description.sub_groups: All containing sensors from the selected subgroups will be added to this group as well

data_description.product_id:
Barcode {barcode} will be mapped to this product. 
Name suggestions are grouped on top of dropdown.
data_description.parent_product: Specify existing or new parent. Leave empty to ignore.

data.name: Product name
data.default_best_before_days_after_open: Default best before days after open

data_description.location_id: Where any new and unopened products are usually stored
data_description.qu_id_stock: 99% of cases this should be Piece/Pack (the one which sounds more appropriate)
data_description.qu_id_price:
Same as ´qu_id_purchase´
Note: this might get automatically updated later if product quantity is derived from 'kg'/'L')

data_description.qu_id_stock:
How do you want to measure the total amount? Often best with 'kg'/'L'
**Avoid Piece/Pack!**
data_description.qu_id_purchase: This could basically be hidden from UI, since parents are never bought. Automatically set same as ´qu_id_stock´ in BE
data_description.qu_id_consume: This could basically be hidden from UI, since parents are never bought. Automatically set same as ´qu_id_stock´ in BE
data_description.qu_id_price:
How do you want to compare prices? Often best with 'kg' or 'L'
**Avoid Piece/Pack!**

data_description.default_consume_location_id: Where are usually opened products placed? These will be consumed first
data_description.product_quantity: The quantity of the actual physical Piece/Pack
data_description.qu_id_product: The quantity unit of the actual physical Piece/Pack
data_description.calories_per_100: The amount of calories per 100 (g/ml). This will be re-calculated and the total calories per Piece/Pack will be saved, please verify after creation...

data_description.note: A fully descriptive name of the specific product with barcode {barcode}
data_description.shopping_location_id: The default store when purchasing this specific barcode
data_description.amount: The default amount when purchasing with this specific barcode
data_description.qu_id: The quantity unit of the amount

data_description.barcodes: A list of barcodes to Provision/Purchase/Consume/etc. in Grocy
